---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the user story? "As a ___, I want to ___ so that ___."

## Proposed solution

If you have a CLI surface in mind:

```bash
trond <new-command> [flags]
```

Or an intent field:

```yaml
nodes:
  - new_field: ...
```

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this? Why is the proposal better?

## Impact

- Existing users: (none / minor / breaking)
- Existing intents: (compatible / require migration)
- Existing state files: (compatible / require migration)
